reasoning: Koneru Humpy's FIDE women's ranking for October 2025 is #6. The gap to #7 (Tan Zhongyi) is just 3 points, but we found no evidence of either player playing classical chess during October 2025. Therefore, it is highly likely that her ranking will remain #6 (or possibly improve to #5 if anyone above her drops points) on the November 2025 FIDE list, which covers both the November 2 and November 25 resolution dates. By January 2026, there is a much higher chance of ratings changing due to possible tournaments in Nov-Dec, and Tan Zhongyi is very active and capable of bridging the 3-point gap. This pushes the probability for the January 2026 date significantly closer to 50%.
